ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code (e.g., sh.601688) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock or company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is listed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stock information was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the stock's currency to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which this price data belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the price data was ingested (e.g., live feed, historical database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the session */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the session is a holiday */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades during the session */,
  "total_traded_amount" REAL /* Total amount traded during the session */,
  "market_index" REAL /* Market index value at the close of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Regular, Pre-market, After-hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session during which the trade occurred */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade took place */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order that resulted in the trade */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, Web, Mobile) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., Executed, Cancelled) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker who executed the trade */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty in the trade */,
  "trade_comment" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Trader, Analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Price Increase, Price Decrease) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "alert_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the alert should be sent (e.g., Email, SMS, Push Notification) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "average_price" REAL /* The average price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Total cost basis of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "unrealized_profit_loss" REAL /* Unrealized profit or loss of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "dividends_received" REAL /* Total dividends received for the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the portfolio entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade that was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade execution */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the trade (e.g., Profit, Loss) */,
  "trade_profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "trade_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  "trade_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the trade */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, Web, Mobile) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., Executed, Cancelled) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker who executed the trade */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty in the trade */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "trade_comment" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
